message:
feat(wasm): enable FrankenSQLite compilation for wasm32-unknown-unknown

Make fsqlite-types compilable without OS-level primitives so that the
SQL parser, AST, query planner, and built-in functions can run in
WebAssembly environments.

Dependency gating:
- fsqlite-types workspace dependency now uses default-features = false;
  all native crates (btree, core, harness, mvcc, observability, pager,
  vdbe, vfs, wal, fsqlite) explicitly opt into features = ["native"]
- Gate asupersync imports, NativeCx struct field, and native↔local
  conversion functions behind #[cfg(feature = "native")] in cx.rs
- Gate three native-Cx-dependent tests behind #[cfg(feature = "native")]

fsqlite-wasm crate:
- Add fsqlite-wasm to workspace members with proper metadata
- Configure crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"] for WASM + Rust consumption
- Re-export fsqlite-ast, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-func, fsqlite-parser,
  fsqlite-planner, fsqlite-types as public API
- Implement parse_sql() convenience function for SQL→AST conversion
- Replace skeleton test with parse_select, parse_create_table, and
  parse_error_reported tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,22 @@
 [package]
 name = "fsqlite-wasm"
 version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
+description = "WebAssembly bindings for FrankenSQLite"
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
+fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-ast = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-parser = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-planner = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-func = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
